string.name: workflow_name
string.value: TEST - Alina Telegram notifier FULLY PINNED HARNESS ONLY

nodes.name: Static pinned input
nodes.notes: ALL pinned values originate here. No dynamic upstream nodes. Downstream nodes MUST use $json.* only.

nodes.name: Load notification state
nodes.notes: Lookup by current item idempotency_key only. NEVER reference dynamic upstream nodes by name.

nodes.name: Normalize notification state
nodes.notes: Uses $input/$json only. No references to Static pinned input or any upstream node by name.

nodes.name: Decide send or skip
nodes.notes: TRUE = send (no existing row). FALSE = skip (duplicate-skip confirmed).

nodes.name: Send a text message
nodes.notes: Credential is a placeholder. Real Telegram bot credential must be bound manually inside n8n. Real chat_id must be set manually inside n8n. No secrets in this template.

nodes.name: Store notification state
nodes.notes: All columns sourced from $json.* current item only.

parameters.jsCode:
// Duplicate-skip confirmed: no Telegram send, no row write.
return [{ json: { result: 'duplicate_skip_confirmed', task_id: $input.first().json.task_id, idempotency_key: $input.first().json.idempotency_key } }];

meta.templateNotes: TEST-only fully-pinned harness. Inactive by default. No real secrets. Real Telegram bot credential and chat_id must be bound manually inside n8n after import. No Schedule Trigger. No Execute authorized by template import alone. Schema details may need minor adjustment in the n8n UI depending on n8n version; see companion .md.
